title: Code Execution Activity (code_run)
entry_point: do_code_run(args, response) — method on handler class
activity_flow: Extract code_type from args (default='python'), code from args['code'] or args['script']
IF code is None → extract from response markdown code block
IF code still None → return StepOutcome('[Error] Code missing') → END
Extract timeout (default=60), cwd, code_cwd from args
[YES] → eval/exec code directly in-process with os.chdir(cwd) → return StepOutcome(result)
[NO]  → yield from code_run(code, code_type, timeout, cwd, code_cwd, stop_signal=self.code_stop_signal)
--- ENTER code_run(code, code_type, timeout, cwd, code_cwd, stop_signal) ---
→ prepend code_run_header.py contents if file exists
→ write user code to temp file → close → cmd = [sys.executable, '-X', 'utf8', '-u', tmp_path]
subprocess.Popen(cmd, stdout=PIPE, stderr=STDOUT, bufsize=0, cwd=cwd, startupinfo)
--- main polling loop (while stream_reader thread is_alive) ---
Start background thread to close process.stdout
FINALLY: if python mode AND tmp_path exists → os.remove(tmp_path)  [temp file cleanup]
key_decisions: inline_eval flag → in-process eval vs subprocess execution
code_type: python → temp .py file | powershell/bash → direct shell cmd | else → error
OS check (os.name=='nt') → powershell vs bash; STARTUPINFO window hiding
Timeout exceeded OR stop_signal non-empty → kill process
stop_signal_mechanism: self.code_stop_signal is a mutable list ([]) on the handler; code_run polls len(stop_signal)>0 each second; external code appends to it to request kill
temp_file_lifecycle: Created via tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False) in code_cwd, prepended with code_run_header.py (patches subprocess.run for encoding), deleted in finally block after process exits
code_run_header_role: Injected at top of every Python temp script: patches subprocess.run to handle bytes↔str encoding transparently; adds sys.excepthook hint for ImportError/AttributeError
streaming: stream_reader runs in daemon thread; reads stdout line-by-line into full_stdout list; main thread polls every 1s for timeout/stop; outputs collected after thread join
key_relationships: do_code_run (handler method) calls code_run (module-level generator function)
code_stop_signal (list on handler) shared between caller and code_run polling loop

method_signatures.code_run: code_run(code: str, code_type='python', timeout=60, cwd=None, code_cwd=None, stop_signal=[]) -> generator
method_signatures.stream_reader: stream_reader(proc: Popen, logs: list) -> None  [nested closure inside code_run]

source_files_analyzed: ga.py (lines 1-90 code_run, lines 277-300 do_code_run, line 267 code_stop_signal)
